violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
Soups were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Observed missing tiles above ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The hoods have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
